text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Updated. 

You just needed to update MASTER_SITES too: 

-MASTER_SITES=  http://pgfoundry.org/frs/download.php/3197/ 
+MASTER_SITES=  http://pgfoundry.org/frs/download.php/3240/ 

pgfoundry has a little bit crazy approach to form URL for download.
